# buildingSMART Sample-Test-Files (subset)

**Source:** [buildingSMART/Sample-Test-Files](https://github.com/buildingSMART/Sample-Test-Files)  
**Path in upstream:** `IFC 4.0.2.1 (IFC 4)/ISO Spec - ReferenceView_V1.2/`  
**Schema:** IFC4  
**Purpose:** CI non-panic + LossReport honesty (not full BIM goldens).

| File | Role |
| :--- | :--- |
| `basin-tessellation.ifc` | Tessellation micro-model; often empty Arx floors |
| `wall-with-opening-and-window.ifc` | Storey + wall/opening; walls not domain-mapped |

Full assessment: `tests/ifc_buildingsmart_report.md`.

Respect buildingSMART sample licensing/attribution when redistributing.
